name: Repo RAG Debugger
summary: A source-aware debugging assistant that indexes codebases, stack traces, and docs to propose grounded fixes.
problem: Developers waste time reconstructing code context from scattered docs, logs, and repository structure.
users: AI engineers, backend teams, open-source maintainers
why_now: Codebase copilots remain weak at repository-specific reasoning and postmortem-style debugging.
mvp: Upload stack traces or pasted errors
Return grounded explanations with cited files
Track accepted fixes for future retrieval
